meta.title: Pt 2 Eve Spaceplane "Pants Destroyer" development
meta.description:
Phase 2 development of our multistage Eve spaceplane the "Pants Destroyer". After a successful entry, decent and landing and  successful accent and orbit, we attached a tug that will push the capsule back towards Kerbin. We're one step closer to mission day!

Show your support by visiting http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Streamed live on http://Twitch.tv/everydayastronaut on 1/3/2017

Instagram @EverydayAstronaut - http://instagram.com/everydayastronaut
